filesystem.description: Secure file operations for RAG Enterprise codebase
filesystem.note: Core MCP - always enabled for token efficiency

git.description: Git repository operations and code search
git.note: Core MCP - always enabled for token efficiency

subAgents.note: Specialized MCP servers moved to sub-agents for token efficiency and parallel processing

crawling-agent.description: Web crawling, scraping, and data acquisition

frontend-agent.description: Frontend development with React, Tailwind, and debugging

rag-agent.description: RAG system optimization - embeddings, chunking, search

testing-agent.description: Automated testing - unit tests, integration tests, coverage

priority_1_no_api_key.description: No API key required - use freely

priority_2_free_tier.description: Free tier available - optional for enhanced features

setup.tavily: Get free API key at https://tavily.com (1000 requests/month free)

reason.brave-search: Paid API ($5/month minimum) - use self-crawling instead
reason.google-drive: Complex OAuth setup - use local filesystem instead

metadata.description: Token-optimized MCP configuration - main project uses only filesystem + git, specialized MCPs in sub-agents
metadata.architecture: Main project (2 MCPs) + Sub-agents (specialized MCPs) for parallel processing
metadata.token_strategy: Keep main context minimal, delegate specialized tasks to sub-agents
